items.name: Workspace Automation Pack
items.description: A starter package for automating repetitive engineering tasks.

items.name: Incident Triage Guide
items.description: A practical guide for diagnosing and resolving production incidents.

items.name: Performance Review Bundle
items.description: A toolkit for profiling, benchmarking, and optimization planning.

tools.name: listItems
tools.description: List all item names in the catalog

tools.name: getItemDetails
tools.description: Get detailed information for a catalog item

prompts.name: planRecommendation
prompts.description: Get a recommendation for which catalog item to use

arguments.name: goal
arguments.description: Primary goal, for example reliability or speed

prompts.template: You are a systems advisor. Recommend the best option for a team%s%s.

prompts.name: itemBrief
prompts.description: Get a concise brief for a specific catalog item

arguments.name: item_name
arguments.description: Name of the item to summarize

prompts.template: Provide a concise brief for %s, including what it is, best use cases, risks, and quick start steps.
